query: I am buried in emails at my desk and need the living room ready for a quick visitor, power on dehumidifier 1 in the living room 5 minutes from now with fan 40% and 9 minutes after the previous action keep it on and bump the fan to 60%. I have a long video call coming up and want the air mild at my workspace, power on air purifier 1 in the office 29 minutes from now with fan 40% and 13 minutes after the previous action keep it on and nudge the fan to 50%

I need to verify the device IDs for the living room and office before scheduling the actions. I will start by getting the devices in the living room.
I need to verify the device IDs for the office to find the air purifier.
I need to understand how to control the dehumidifier and air purifier, specifically how to set the fan speed. I will get the control rules for humidity and air quality.

steps.thought: I need to verify the clusters and attributes for the dehumidifier to ensure I use the correct endpoint and cluster for fan control.
I need to verify the clusters and attributes for the air purifier to ensure I use the correct endpoint and cluster for fan control.
I will schedule the first workflow to turn on the dehumidifier and set the fan to 40% at 18:57:05 (5 minutes from now).
I will schedule the second workflow to update the dehumidifier fan speed to 60% at 19:06:05 (9 minutes after the first action).
I will schedule the third workflow to turn on the air purifier and set the fan to 40% at 19:21:05 (29 minutes from now).
I will schedule the fourth workflow to update the air purifier fan speed to 50% at 19:34:05 (13 minutes after the previous action).
All workflows have been successfully scheduled according to the user's timeline. I will now provide a summary of the scheduled actions to complete the task.
